purpose: Use the frozen local-Gemma challenge set as a bounded, cost-controlled hosted-model preflight before any candidate reaches the complete factorial matrix.

stages.decision: Reject a candidate immediately on an irreversible safety or contract failure; otherwise evaluate the complete first repeat against every first-repeat gate.
Evaluate two-repeat contract and quality gates; retain repeat variation as an observation rather than requiring byte-identical hosted output.

irreversible_early_stop.mechanical: Stop once accepted requests plus every remaining request in the active gate cannot reach its minimum.
irreversible_early_stop.token_limit: Stop after the first token-limit failure.
irreversible_early_stop.gross_edit: Stop after the first mechanically accepted target above the 30 percent normalized word-edit boundary.
irreversible_early_stop.correct_input_regression: Stop after the first previously correct target gains a word error.

cost_policy.conservative_input_accounting: Count each rendered Unicode code point as one input token for the hard planning envelope; this deliberately overstates normal tokenizer usage.

decision_rule: Only candidates that pass repeat one receive repeat two. Only candidates that pass the complete two-repeat gates may be considered for the full factorial matrix or later held-out professional-audio evaluation.
claim_limit: This is a selected synthetic development challenge set. It can reject candidates but cannot estimate product quality, rank raw STT engines, or replace held-out human-verified professional audio.
